prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-HVUMOSV-ONE-LMGRN-UT Product Type: APPAREL Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: High Visibility Universal FIt Unisex Lime Green Mesh Safety Vest - One Size Fits All Description: A Safety Vest is a necessity on many job sites or other activities like hunting or riding your bike at night.

It is important to be visible and this is the ideal product to draw attention to yourself.

Constructed from 100% polyester mesh, this item is lightweight and breathable. It's bright lime green color will attract anyone's attention to keep you safe and out of harms way.

Made to be worn by any gender and most body sizes, this safety vest is a smart investment if you are involved in any activity where visibility is important. Pick one up today, it might save your life! Search Terms: pull over safety vest neighborhood safety securty vestconstruction bikers dog walkers hikers crossing guards Features: - Universal Safety Vest - High Visibility Lime Green - Size: 25" x 25" | One Size Fits Most - Lightweight & Easy to Carry and Store When Not In Use; Weight: 2oz. - Breathable Mesh Material for Comfort - Hook & Loop Closures === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool Lime Green High Visibility Safety Vest

openai.item_name: Universal Tool One Size Lime Green Mesh Safety Vest

anthropic.title_differentiation: High Visibility, Breathable Mesh, Universal Fit, Lightweight, Hook And Loop Closures

openai.title_differentiation: High Visibility Lime Green Breathable Mesh Hook And Loop Closure Lightweight 2Oz One Size Fits Most Daily Use
